ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area for which the data is collected */,
  "caucasian_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of Caucasian population */,
  "african_american_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of African American population */,
  "hispanic_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population */,
  "asian_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of Asian population */,
  "other_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of Other population */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population count for the year */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the population */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of the population */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category (e.g., Caucasian, African American) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year in which the trend is recorded */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racial category being analyzed */,
  "geographical_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical area */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the trend is being recorded */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the trend is being recorded */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in that category for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES racial_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_geographical_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographical_area_id") REFERENCES geographical_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of the geographical area (e.g., state, city, county) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES demographics ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "geographical_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical area the report is about */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_geographical_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographical_area_id") REFERENCES geographical_areas ("area_id")
)
